theorems.1_convergence: M_t converges to domain-characterizing covariance at O(1/sqrt(t))
theorems.2_gtc_coverage: Hit rate converges as cache covers the domain's effective manifold
theorems.3_domain_separation: Orthogonal UGT encodings produce separated COG metrics
theorems.4_information_gain: Per-turn gain decreases with exposure → genuine learning

unified_theorem: Living manifold converges, separates domains, and exhibits learning
implications: .MIKU is necessary — no other format captures learned geometry
GTC provides asymptotic 100% cache hit rate
The metric IS the model's experience
